lastReleaseMessage: Security and docs: delete the three stale dependabot branches that kept pre-scrub .finances commits reachable on the GitHub remote, correct the .gitignore exposure note to the now-unreferenced state, and add docs/FINANCES_REMOTE_GC.md remediation runbook. Completes the DESIGN section 4 constraint annotations across the accounts, categories, rules, and imports tables.

barRaise.topFinding: The single carried item that still matters is the .finances/ history exposure, and v0.13.4 sharpened it from unverified to confirmed open: the 2026-06-23 authed gh api check found the three pre-rewrite commits 44b7b10, f670d17, 43ea16b still resolve on the GitHub remote by direct SHA at HTTP 200 with real Checking/Credit statements, unreachable from every ref so only a server-side GC closes it. Exposure is bounded to private-repo read access plus SHA knowledge, so it stays MEDIUM. The rest of the app path is clean for the tenth straight cycle: v0.13.4 shipped (c574d4e), version pills align at 0.13.4 across all four packages plus the DESIGN header and the App pill, and the cycle closed five carried LOWs (loop-probe untrack, the CLAUDE.md index.lock hazard entry, the Plaid Production cost note, the queue prune from 16 rows to 1, and the audit-enqueue stale row). The only carried structural risk is the archived keytar on the encrypted-boot path. Verdict holds at healthy.
